handoff_brief.task_context: Complete eval infrastructure migration from 4 shell scripts with embedded Python (~87KB: scripts/eval-run.sh, scripts/eval-graders.sh, scripts/eval-report.sh, scripts/eval-export-workbench.sh) to TypeScript/Bun module system in evals/src/. All 8 team tasks completed. 141 tests pass. 5 bugs found and fixed during review. Ready to ship.

domain_rules.rule: 4-phase pipeline executes in strict order: Agents > Graders > Scoring > Assembly
domain_rules.testable_assertion: Graders complete before scoring starts, scoring completes before assembly starts.

domain_rules.rule: Grader Override: any grader failure forces final score to 'fail' regardless of LLM rubric
domain_rules.testable_assertion: Given any grader passed=false, final score='fail' and grader_override=true.

domain_rules.rule: Score closed enum: exactly 'pass', 'partial', 'fail' — no case normalization
domain_rules.testable_assertion: Capitalized 'Pass' treated as invalid, not silently lowercased.

domain_rules.rule: All 8 grader types supported with behavioral parity
domain_rules.testable_assertion: Each grader produces identical pass/fail and detail messages as Python.

domain_rules.rule: JSON extraction uses 3-tier strategy with string-aware brace-depth scanner
domain_rules.testable_assertion: Brace-depth scanner respects string boundaries (Kobe fix verified).

domain_rules.rule: json_field [*] wildcard handles null values explicitly
domain_rules.testable_assertion: equals/contains checks on null produce clear failure messages (Kobe fix verified).

domain_rules.rule: Scorer handles non-zero exit codes with valid output
domain_rules.testable_assertion: When CLI exits non-zero but produces valid NDJSON, output is used (Kobe fix verified).

domain_rules.rule: pipeline.ts calls report.ts directly, no shell script dependency
domain_rules.testable_assertion: No shell script references in pipeline.ts (Pippen fix verified).
SSE spawn command confirmed as 'bun evals/src/cli.ts' at line 98 (Pippen fix verified).

architecture_guidance.decision: Flat module system in evals/src/ — one file per component
architecture_guidance.implementation_note: 14 source files, 8 test files. Co-located with scenario definitions.
json-extract, scenario-parser, graders, assembler are pure functions. agent-runner and scorer are impure.
BunClaudeAdapter wraps Bun.spawn. Tests inject mocks returning canned NDJSON.
Map<string, GraderFn> — each of 8 types independently testable.
Bun provides subprocess, filesystem, and test runner.
Scenario .md format and final result JSON schema unchanged. Dashboard compatibility preserved.

acceptance_criteria.then: All 141 tests pass (137 original + 4 added during Kobe fix round)

acceptance_criteria.given: sse.ts updated to spawn TS CLI
acceptance_criteria.then: bun evals/src/cli.ts is spawned, SSE streams output to browser

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All 8 grader types produce identical results
acceptance_criteria.then: Same pass/fail and detail messages as Python

acceptance_criteria.given: Brace-depth scanner with string boundary tracking
acceptance_criteria.when: JSON contains braces inside string values

acceptance_criteria.given: claude CLI exits non-zero but produces valid output
acceptance_criteria.then: Valid output is used, not discarded

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No shell script dependencies remain in execution path
acceptance_criteria.then: Zero references to old shell scripts in execution path

terminology_alignment.definition: Markdown test case with prompt, expected_behavior, failure_modes, scoring_rubric, optional graders.
Hard gate: any grader failure forces score to 'fail'.
Phase 1 artifact: agent_output, trace, tokens, cost, duration.
Phase 3 artifact: final score, grader results, rubric details, trials.
Phase 4 artifact: full run report consumed by web dashboard.

contradictions_resolved.conflict: pipeline.ts shelled out to eval-report.sh instead of report.ts module
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Pippen identified; Shaq fixed to call triggerMigration() from report.ts directly

contradictions_resolved.conflict: web/src/sse.ts spawned old eval-run.sh shell script
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Pippen identified; Shaq updated to spawn 'bun evals/src/cli.ts'

contradictions_resolved.conflict: Brace-depth JSON scanner treated braces inside strings as structural
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Kobe identified; Shaq added inString tracking with escape handling

contradictions_resolved.conflict: json_field equals/contains silently skipped null values
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Kobe identified; Shaq added explicit null checks with clear failure messages

contradictions_resolved.conflict: Scorer discarded valid output when claude CLI exited non-zero
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Kobe identified; Shaq updated to check for valid NDJSON regardless of exit code

high_confidence_areas: All 14 source modules implemented and verified on disk
All 5 bugs found by reviewers confirmed fixed on disk
web/src/sse.ts confirmed updated to spawn TS CLI (line 98)
No shell script references remain in execution path
Scenario format and final JSON schema unchanged
low_confidence_areas: sse.ts line 3 comment still says 'eval-run.sh' — stale comment, code is correct
Long-tail scenario parser edge cases across 120+ real files
Python re.sub normalization exact equivalence for untested patterns
assumptions: Bun runtime available in project environment
Web dashboard consumes only final JSON, not intermediate artifacts
Old shell scripts can be archived after user validates end-to-end

Run 'bun evals/src/cli.ts --agent bird --trials 1 --dry-run' to verify scenario discovery
Run a real eval against one agent and diff output JSON against Python baseline
Validate web dashboard renders new JSON correctly via live eval run
